title: The Ark Begins to Move
description: Enel’s plan threatens all of Skypiea while Luffy and the crew race toward the decisive confrontation.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Luffy, Enel, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Enel’s plan threatens all of Skypiea while Luffy and the crew race toward the decisive confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Who in God's name are you....!?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: The name's Luffy! I'm a pirate,

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Your lightning won't work on me!

summary: Enel’s plan threatens all of Skypiea while Luffy and the crew race toward the decisive confrontation.
